title: Slow Computer and Full Storage
drDigitalIntro:
A slow computer often has too many apps open or full storage.
• Performance suffers when storage is over 90% full.
• Delete files you don't need and empty the trash.
• Close apps you're not using to free up memory.

playgroundTask.goal: You freed up storage to improve performance
playgroundTask.scenario: The computer is running slow due to full storage

steps.say: Read the error about storage being full.
Check how much storage you have left.
The drive is nearly full! Clear old files and cache to free up space.

drDigitalSuccess: You freed up storage! A fuller drive = a slower computer. Keep at least 10% of your storage free.
drDigitalHint: Check Storage first to see how full it is, then click Clear Storage to clean up.
